source: Aggregated from trade-press RSS (gCaptain, Splash247, Maritime Executive, Hellenic Shipping News, OilPrice)

outages.headline: Russia Faces Growing Fuel Crunch as Ukrainian Strikes Knock Out Refineries
outages.summary: Russia is facing its worst nationwide fuel shortages in years, with at least 17 regions imposing mandatory restrictions on gasoline and diesel sales, and dozens of others reporting shortages or restrictions by private fuel companies. The increasing scarcity of fuel has been caused mainly by a widening campaign of Ukrainian drone strikes targeting oil terminals, refineries, and pipelines. The largest fuel supplier to the Moscow region, the Kapotnya refinery, was hit twice this month; the plant will be offline until at least the end of 2026, unnamed…

outages.headline: Major Saudi Oil Terminal to Restart as Gulf Reboot Ramps Up
outages.summary: Top oil exporter Saudi Arabia is set to restart loading crude at the giant Ras Tanura terminal inside the Persian Gulf, a landmark moment in the resumption of Middle Eastern supplies after the Iran war.
